headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Genuine Parts, Lowers Price Target to $125
summary: UBS  analyst Michael Lasser   maintains Genuine Parts (NYSE:GPC) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $135 to $125.

headline: GPC Q1 Deep Dive: Supply Chain Resilience and Segment Separation Shape Outlook
summary: Auto and industrial parts retailer Genuine Parts (NYSE:GPC) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 6.8% year on year to $6.26 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.77 per share was 1.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: A Look At Genuine Parts (GPC) Valuation After Earnings Beat And Planned Two Company Split
summary: Genuine Parts (GPC) is back in focus after first quarter 2026 earnings, where sales reached about US$6.3b and management reaffirmed full year guidance while progressing the planned split into two public companies. See our latest analysis for Genuine Parts. The earnings beat and reaffirmed outlook have come as the share price has gained momentum, with a 1 month share price return of 19.32% even as the 3 year total shareholder return of a 23.84% decline shows longer term holders have faced a...
